notes: manualChunks (vite.config.ts) splits vendors into vendor-react, vendor-xterm, vendor-framer, vendor-codemirror so the hero-loop app chunk stays lean and vendors cache independently.

vendor-codemirror (333 KB gz) is the CodeMirror language-pack set behind the lazy `code-editor` route — it never loads on the overview or focus-terminal hero path, so it is not counted against the main-app-JS budget.
Lighthouse perf >=85 / FCP <500ms / TTI <1.5s are documented targets; run `bunx lighthouse` against the dev server (see PERF.md) to archive an HTML report alongside this baseline.
